chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-526 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 24-10-2024 Mr. Aijaz Ali Sipra, Advocate along with applicant. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, APG. **** Mr. Rajib Ali Malano, Advocate files Vakalatnama and statement on behalf of respondents No.2 to 8, taken on record. Heard learned counsel for applicant, respondents and APG and perused the impugned order. From perusal of impugned order, it reflects that bail was granted to respondents on the ground that there appears landed dispute between the parties and there is delay in registration of FIR; all the sections applied in FIR are bailable except sections 337A(ii), 324, 506/2 PPC, which do not fall within prohibitory clause of section 497 CrPC. Though section 324 PPC is punishable upto ten years; however, while deciding bail application, lesser sentence is to be considered and applicability of section 324 PPC is also to be decided by the trial Court at the time of trial. No case for any interference of this Court is made out. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed. JUDGE Ahmad
